body: Citi Indonesia (CITI) reported a 32% year-over-year increase in net profit at the end of September 2024, driven by operational expense efficiency, with a cost-to-income ratio improving to 41.9% from 59.8%. Despite this, the bank's credit distribution in September 2024 was IDR 30.5 trillion, significantly lower than the IDR 42.84 trillion disbursed in 9M 2023, due to challenges in long-term investment and the transfer of retail banking assets to UOB Indonesia (UOB).
title: Citi Indonesia's net profit surges 32% year-on-year despite decline in credit distribution due to operational efficiency and challenges in the banking sector.
